timeline.title: B.Tech Student (Computer Science and Engineering)
achievements: Built a role-based e-commerce backend using Java, Spring Boot, MySQL, Spring Security, and JWT
Developed a doctor appointment system using FastAPI, MySQL, SQLAlchemy, and JWT
timeline.impact: Built strong backend fundamentals through hands-on academic projects and core computer science training.

timeline.title: Software Engineer (Backend Engineer)
achievements: Developed and deployed scalable backend services using Java, Spring Boot, and Microservices Architecture for a platform serving 11.8M+ users
Implemented a pricing feature enabling ~56% of users to upgrade channels, improving subscription workflows and user engagement
Designed and built a promotions system with multi-service integration supporting configurable business rules
Developed a search and discovery service using Elasticsearch with filtering, fuzzy search, and sorting
Built a centralized data access microservice integrating multiple downstream services
Managed production deployments, debugging, and root cause analysis to maintain reliable releases
timeline.impact: Currently shipping production backend systems focused on scale, business growth, search, and reliability.

timeline.title: Backend Engineer
achievements: Work on distributed systems and microservices architecture
Deliver reliable production systems with strong engineering practices
